authority_results.f5_authority: canonical historical AH facts with approved team mapping

implemented_changes: Moved checkpoint planning and due-plan lookup to MatchdayRuntimeRepository and matchday_intake.v2 policy.
Retired FutureRefreshCheckpointPlanModel writes through the compatibility repository API.
Added checkpoint and fixture identity to endpoint captures and persisted market observations as first-class runtime evidence.
Added deterministic manifest identity validation and fail-closed manifest conflict handling.
Routed DB-backed future refresh provider responses into MatchdayEndpointCapture records.
Made legacy checkpoint_refresh and matchday_schedule derive checkpoint definitions from matchday_intake.v2.
Added canonical F5 team-history query with approved team mapping requirement.
Added F8 reviewed as-of authority query that cannot make formal eligible while formal capability is disabled.
Added W2DataAssetRegistryV1 builder and CLI using storage aliases instead of private absolute paths.
Added Alembic revision 0029 and PostgreSQL CI round-trip coverage.
external_blockers: BACKUP_LOCATION_REQUIRED for private data asset registry backup and restore drill.
LICENSE_HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED for private historical source assets.
TEAM_CROSSWALK_REVIEW_REQUIRED before F5 can be treated as complete for all runtime teams.
PLAYER_CROSSWALK_REVIEW_REQUIRED and reviewed valuation coverage before F8 can support formal evidence.
POSTGRES_STAGING_MIGRATION_SMOKE_REQUIRED in GitHub or staging because local W2_TEST_POSTGRES_URL was not provided.
READ_ONLY_STAGING_CANARY_REQUIRED before deployment or real provider enablement.
MANUAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED before any calibration, formal recommendation, lock, production deployment, or public capability opening.

acceptance_answers.6_freshness_runtime_gate: recommendation quote freshness is capped at 1800 seconds; collection freshness remains separately audited
acceptance_answers.9_decision_hash_projection: canonical manifest and V3 decision hash are wired; deployed API/Dashboard parity still requires read-only canary
acceptance_answers.12_f8_authority: reviewed as-of artifact only; static or unreviewed values are incomplete
acceptance_answers.17_postgresql_verified: CI workflow updated; local PostgreSQL test skipped without W2_TEST_POSTGRES_URL
